code:
---
config:
  logLevel: 'debug'
  theme: 'base'
---
gitGraph
    %% Step 1: Initial state: main branch with v1.0.0 tag
    commit id: "1.0.0" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Step 2: Create release/1 from main for next release preparation
    branch release/1 order: 2
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.1"
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.2"

    %% Step 3: Create release/2 from the second commit of release/1 (Infra_WorkerNode)
    %% release/1 at this point: 1.0.1-rc.1.post.2, so release/2 continues from there
    checkout release/1
    branch release/2 order: 1
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.3"

    %% Step 4: Go back to release/1 and add the problematic third commit (Infra_EtcdCluster)
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.3" tag: "issues found"

    %% Step 5: release/2 completes preparation successfully
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.4"

    %% Step 6: Merge release/2 to main and release v1.1.0
    checkout main
    merge release/2 id: "1.1.0" tag: "v1.1.0"
repo_description: Automatic versioning for every commit - Generate semantic versions from any commit across all branches, or dirty working directory, with seamless pre-release handling and flexible format support for a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个发布流程的Git图，展示两个并行release分支的情况。主线main已经发布了v1.0.0，现在要从main切出release/1来做1.0.1的准备工作。
明白，release/1是基于main的v1.0.0切出来的。那这个分支要做几个commit？另外我注意到您提到'并行'，是不是还有另一个分支？
对，release/1先打两个rc包：1.0.1-rc.1.post.1和1.0.1-rc.1.post.2。然后从第二个commit再切一个release/2，这是给Infra_WorkerNode用的，order要设为1，比release/1靠前。
好的，release/2从release/1的第二个commit切出，order设为1。release/2上我放一个commit 1.0.1-rc.2.post.3。接下来release/1还要继续开发吗？
对，切回release/1再加第三个commit，这是给Infra_EtcdCluster准备的，但这个版本有问题，要打个tag标记'issues found'。同时release/2那边继续正常迭代，再加一个post.4的commit完成准备。
确认一下：release/1最终有三个commit，第三个带issues found标签；release/2有两个commit，post.3和post.4。最后要把release/2合回main发v1.1.0，对吗？
没错，因为release/1那边有etcd的问题，所以只合并release/2到main，发布v1.1.0。整个图要体现这种分支间的check和选择逻辑。
完成了。main分支从v1.0.0开始，release/1和release/2并行开发，release/2成功merge回main并打上v1.1.0标签。config里我加了debug日志级别和base主题，方便后续排查。
